title: MindFlow Context Engine Contract
description: Interface for building context from graph nodes for LLM calls

ContextStrategy.description: Strategy for selecting nodes to include in context

SummaryType.description: Method for summarizing context if it exceeds token budget

focus_node_id.description: Primary node of interest (optional for some strategies)

manual_node_ids.description: Explicitly selected nodes (used with ManualOverride strategy)

depth.description: Distance from focus node (0 = focus, 1 = parent/child, etc.)

summarized.description: Whether context was summarized to fit budget

context_text.description: Formatted context ready for LLM prompt

Timeline.description: Select nodes in chronological order (oldest to newest or newest to oldest)
Timeline.behavior: Sort all nodes by created_at timestamp, include most recent until token budget met

GraphNeighborhood.description: Select nodes around focus node (parents, children, siblings)
GraphNeighborhood.behavior: Include focus node + direct parents/children + parents' children (siblings) up to token budget

GroupContext.description: Select all nodes in the same group(s) as focus node
GroupContext.behavior: Include all nodes that share at least one group with focus node

ManualOverride.behavior: Include only nodes listed in manual_node_ids parameter

GlobalSummary.description: Summarize entire graph into single overview
GlobalSummary.behavior: Group nodes by type, generate one-sentence summary per type

TemporalSummary.description: Prioritize recent nodes, summarize older ones
TemporalSummary.behavior: Include full content for newest nodes, summarize older nodes in batches

WeightedSummary.behavior: Sort by meta.importance, include high-importance nodes fully, summarize low-importance

GroupSummary.behavior: Generate summary for each group separately, then combine summaries

PathSummary.description: Summarize path from root to focus node
PathSummary.behavior: Trace lineage from focus node to root(s), include key nodes along path

HybridSummary.behavior: Use importance + recency + depth to prioritize, summarize least relevant nodes

buildContext.description: Build context from graph for LLM call

previewContext.description: Preview what would be included without building full text

countTokens.description: Count tokens in text using current provider's tokenizer

provider.description: Provider to use for token counting

formatting.description: How context text is formatted for LLM consumption
